uses.rightsBasisEvidence: Only course-specific facts and curriculum structure were used. The lesson's wording, organization, examples, and assessment are independently created; CONTENT-LICENSE.md separately licenses course content under CC BY 4.0.

agentAccess.notes: The source was read from the user-supplied local checkout at the archived commit. The repository content license covers course/ under CC BY 4.0 and states no source-specific agent-ingestion restriction. No login, paywall, access control, scraping, or remote ingestion route was used.
